title: sutera tomentosa
intro: Sutera tomentosa, also known as the sweet marjoram or sweet majoram, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Sutera tomentosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or infused in hot water to release its medicinal properties and health benefits.
